resources.string: Change your username and password for this podcast and its episodes
Automatically download episodes from the inbox
Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play
Automatically activate the sleep timer when pressing play between %1$s and %2$s
Create a backup of the AntennaPod database every 3 days. Only keep the 5 most recent backups.
Access the most important screens from everywhere, in a single tap
Please choose the base of your data folder. AntennaPod will create the appropriate subdirectories.
This will clear the entire playback history. Are you sure you want to proceed?
Please confirm that you want to remove ALL episodes from the queue.
Detailed logs may contain sensitive information, such as your subscriptions list
Downloading over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. AntennaPod can download the episode later automatically when Wi-Fi is available.

"- Using a VPN? Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). If you want this problem fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app. - Not using a VPN? Open the Android Wi-Fi settings and change the type of your Wi-Fi to not be metered."

"Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.
Do you want to refresh anyway?"

"Your VPN app pretends to be a mobile network (metered connection). Refreshing podcasts over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings.
Do you want to refresh anyway? If you want this problem to be fixed, contact the creators of your VPN app."
Streaming over mobile data connection is disabled in the settings. Tap to stream anyway.
Everyone can help to make AntennaPod better - with code, translations or by helping users in our forum
Transfer subscriptions, listened episodes and queue to AntennaPod on another device
Import AntennaPod database from another device
Importing a database will replace all of your current subscriptions and playing history. You should export your current database as a backup. Do you want to replace?
Please confirm that you want to delete all played downloads.
Deleting removes the episode from AntennaPod and deletes the media file from your device storage. It cannot be downloaded again through AntennaPod.
Please confirm that you want to delete the tag \"%1$s\".
IO Error: failed to connect to feeds.example.com/100.100.100.100 (port 80) after 3000ms: isConnected failed: ECONNREFUSED (Connection refused)

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus ullamcorper tempor metus, at varius tellus dignissim et. Fusce quis justo sollicitudin, feugiat mi in, accumsan erat. Fusce tempor, sapien ut luctus scelerisque, lectus nisi hendrerit odio, eget mattis lorem massa id eros. Integer consequat tellus eu rhoncus pellentesque. Quisque et leo faucibus, aliquam nisi ut, feugiat lectus.
The download was blocked by another app on your device (like a VPN or ad blocker).
Unable to establish a secure connection. This can mean that another app on your device (like a VPN or an ad blocker) blocked the download, or that something is wrong with the server certificates.
"The podcast host's server refuses to respond."
There is not enough space left on your device.
"The podcast host's server does not know where to find the file. It may have been deleted."
"The podcast host's server sent a broken podcast feed. We recommend checking with a podcast validator such as castfeedvalidator.com and contacting the podcast creator to let them know."
Download of \"%1$s\" failed. Will be retried later.
Authentication error. Make sure that username and password are correct.
Cannot find the server. Check if the address is typed correctly and if you have a working network connection.
"The podcast host's server sent a website, not a podcast."
The address you entered is a website address, not a podcast RSS address.
The server connection was lost before completing the download
Update interval, Mobile data, Automatic download, Automatic deletion
Number of downloaded and unplayed episodes
Number of episodes in the inbox
Sort by number of played episodes
"You've played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. We bet you keep your desk clean, too!"
"Numbers don't lie, they say. And with only %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions having been played this year, we're probably right."
"You've played episodes from %1$d%% of your %2$d active subscriptions this year. How about checking out \"%3$s\" again?"
"Looking at the numbers, we think you're a hoarder"
"We've also been wondering: do you listen to the podcasts that you're subscribed to?"
Your top podcasts and stats from the past year. Exclusively on your phone.
Typically, you completed an episode %1$s after it was released.
"We've run some analysis on when episodes are released, and when you completed them. Our conclusion?"
"That's about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. Wait, what?"
"That's about %1$s each day until %2$d starts. You can start the year clean if you skip a few episodes."
"And you're ready to make a clean start of the year. You have"
And you still have quite a bit to go this year. You have
"Now, let's take a look at your favorite podcasts…"

"for joining us this year!
Whether you've moved over from another app, or started your podcast adventure with us: we're glad to have you!"

"for sticking with us this year!
You played your first episode with us in %1$s. It's been our honor to serve you since."

Changing the RSS address can easily break the playback state and episode listings of the podcast. We do NOT recommend changing it and will NOT provide support if anything goes wrong. This cannot be undone. The broken subscription CANNOT be repaired by simply changing the address back. We recommend creating a backup before continuing.
Enable swipe actions for this screen
List of terms used to decide if an episode should be included or excluded when auto downloading
Show a notification when a new episode is released
Exclude episodes containing any of the terms below
Archiving hides the subscription from the list and stops looking for new episodes. Downloads, statistics and playback state are kept.
Deleting removes the subscription including all its episodes, downloads, playback history, and statistics.
Automatic download enabled. Episodes are added to the inbox and then moved to the queue once downloaded.
Specify an interval at which AntennaPod looks for new episodes automatically
Change the tags of this podcast to help organize your subscriptions
Turn volume for episodes of this podcast up or down: %1$s
Gpodder.net is an open-source podcast synchronization service that you can install on your own server. Gpodder.net is independent of the AntennaPod project.
Password and data are not encrypted!
Congratulations! Your gpodder.net account is now linked with your device. AntennaPod will from now on automatically sync subscriptions on your device with your gpodder.net account.
Usernames may only contain letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.
You can add episodes by downloading them or long-pressing them and selecting \"Add to queue\".
You can download any episode to listen to it offline.
New episodes will show up here. You can then decide whether you are interested in them.
You already played all recent episodes. Nothing to be surprised here ;)
You are not subscribed to any podcasts yet. Open the menu to add a podcast.
Show your subscriptions to a friend
Move subscriptions and queue to another device
This database was exported with a newer version of AntennaPod. Your current installation does not yet know how to handle this file.
Please press OK to restart AntennaPod
Include only episodes containing any of the terms below
Include this podcast when (auto-)refreshing all podcasts
This virtual podcast was created by adding a folder to AntennaPod.
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Only common tags from all selected subscriptions are shown. Other tags stay unaffected.
Please confirm that you want to mark all selected items as played.
Please confirm that you want to mark all selected items as unplayed.
Multi select actions shown at the bottom
Continuous playback is disabled in the settings. Always stopping at the end of the episode.

"Unable to log into your Nextcloud.
- Check your network connection. - Confirm that you are using the correct server address. - Make sure that the Gpodder Sync Nextcloud plugin is installed."
Try clearing the filter to see more episodes.
When you add a podcast, the episodes will be shown here.
You can archive podcasts from the main subscriptions screen.
You can download episodes on the podcast details screen.
The suggested podcast did not have an RSS link, AntennaPod found a podcast that could match
This was the last episode in the queue
After you listen to an episode, it will appear here.
When new episodes arrive, they will be shown here. You can then decide if you are interested in them or not.
Add an episode by downloading it, or long press an episode and select \"Add to queue\".
Download logs will appear here when available.
Item does not contain a media file
No episodes lined up, but there are new episodes that await you!
To subscribe to a podcast, press the plus icon below.
Shown when download or feed update fails.
Shown when a new episode of a podcast was found, where notifications are enabled
Allows to control playback. This is the main notification you see while playing a podcast.
Shown while checking for new episodes.
Shown if your action is required, for example if you need to enter a password.
The link you tapped does not contain a valid podcast URL. Please verify the link and try again, or search for the podcast manually.
Looks like you download a lot. Do you want episode lists to show download buttons?
Looks like you stream a lot. Do you want episode lists to show stream buttons?
Transfer your subscriptions to another podcast app
Access to external storage is required to read the OPML file
Import your subscriptions from another podcast app
An error has occurred while reading the file. Make sure that you have actually selected an OPML file and that the file is valid.
To jump to positions, you need to play the episode

"The media file could not be played.
- Try deleting and re-downloading the episode. - Check your network connection, and make sure no VPN or login page is blocking access. - Try long-pressing and sharing the \"Media address\" to your web browser to see if it can be played there. If not, contact the podcast creators."
Please wait some time before refreshing podcasts again.
Please wait until the data is loaded
Delete episodes after playing or when automatic download needs space
Note that for local folders this will remove episodes from AntennaPod and delete their media files from your device storage. They cannot be downloaded again through AntennaPod. Enable auto delete?
Include local folders in Auto delete functionality
Automatically download episodes from the inbox. Can be overridden per podcast.
Allow automatic download when the battery is not charging
Configure the automatic download of episodes
Pressing the back button on the default page opens the navigation drawer
Use full black for the dark theme
You must select exactly two items
Screen that is opened when starting AntennaPod
Automatically remove an episode from the queue when it is deleted
Display play button instead of delete button on downloads screen
Add downloaded episodes to the queue
Automatic download is stopped if this number is reached
Episodes that should be eligible for removal if Auto Download needs space for new episodes
Use the episode specific cover in lists whenever available. If unchecked, the app will always use the podcast cover image.
This usually expands the notification to show playback buttons.
Customize the number of seconds to jump forward when the fast-forward button is clicked
Keep episodes when they are marked favorite
The speed to use when starting audio playback for episodes in this podcast
This setting is unique to each podcast. You can change it by opening the podcast page.
Jump to next queue item when playback completes
Change the buttons on the playback notification
Choose the default order for episodes on the podcast screen
Change the login information for your gpodder.net account.
Select what should be allowed over the mobile data connection
Change which items appear in the navigation drawer or bottom navigation
Action to take for new episodes
Pause playback when headphones or Bluetooth devices get disconnected
Pause playback instead of lowering volume when another app wants to play sounds
Keep notification and lockscreen controls when playback is paused
Customize the speeds available for variable speed playback
Displayed position and duration are adapted to playback speed
Adjust media info to playback speed
Customize the number of seconds to jump backwards when the rewind button is clicked
Display remaining time of episodes when checked. If unchecked, display total duration of episodes.
Keep episodes when they are skipped
Mark episodes as played even if less than a certain amount of seconds of playing time is still left
Display stream button instead of download button in lists
Adapt app colors based on the wallpaper
Resume playback when the headphones get reconnected
%1$.2fx is already saved as a preset.
Host is not a valid IP address or domain
If you lock the queue, you can no longer swipe or reorder episodes.
Want to join? Whether you want to translate, support, design or code, we would be happy to have you!
Since %1$s, you played %2$s%3$d%4$s hours of podcasts.
AntennaPod is developed by volunteers in their free time. Share your appreciation of their work by leaving a nice rating.
In case of permission denials, you can use this to re-connect to the exact same folder. Do not select another folder.
Last refresh failed. Tap to view details.
Please confirm that you want to remove all from the inbox.

Sorry to hear something isn’t working. We’d love your help to improve AntennaPod. Please check our forum or GitHub to see if the issue has already been reported. If not, let us know and we’ll investigate.
Instead of always automatically enabling the sleep timer with one episode, please instead disable \"continuous playback\" in the settings.
You are not subscribed to this podcast yet. Subscribe for free to access it more easily and keep its playback history.
Include duration of episodes that are just marked as played
This will erase the history of duration played for all episodes. Are you sure you want to proceed?
Notice: Playback speed is never taken into account.
Choose what happens when swiping an episode in a list
Please provide the credentials of your account on the synchronization server.
Re-synchronize all subscriptions and episode states
You can pick your own server to synchronize with. When you have identified your preferred synchronization server, please enter its address here.

"Logged in as %1$s on %2$s.
You can choose your synchronization provider again once you have logged out."
Grant access using the opened web browser and come back to AntennaPod.
Please select the device that you created on the synchronization server or create a new one.
Gpodder Sync is an open-source Nextcloud app that you can easily install on your own server. Gpodder Sync is independent of the AntennaPod project.
You can choose from multiple providers to synchronize your subscriptions and episode play state with
Synchronize subscription and episode state changes
Invalid input, time has to be an integer
Unable to start system file manager
Please make sure that you trust the website \"%1$s\".
